article_meta.title: Air Force One returns to Washington area due to minor electrical issue, White House says 1 of 4 | President Donald Trump

reasoning: The summary is neutral, attributes claims to the White House, and avoids adopting any loaded or sensational framing. No opinions are presented as facts, and perspectives are represented proportionally for a straightforward incident report.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs and matter-of-fact phrasing throughout.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: All claims are attributed to the White House or drawn directly from the article.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: No subjective judgments stated as facts; evaluative terms are attributed.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: No dramatic or alarming language used.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks or character judgments.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about intentions or thoughts.
custom_reasoning.slant: No competing perspectives to imbalance; attribution is clear.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Covers all relevant elements reported (issue, return, reroute, Davos trip).
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Adjectives like 'minor' are attributed to the White House.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Tone matches the factual, low-stakes nature of the event.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: Relies on the single official source present without undue deference.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Maintains neutral framing consistent with AP reporting.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Includes the White House statement and AP context; no other perspectives present in source.
